programme.title: My Near-Death Experience - My New Beginning
programme.desc: What does dying feel like? What is it like to stand on the threshold of death - and turn back? Three young women talk about their near-death experiences and how these moments changed their lives.

programme.title: Explore Abandoned Spas And Death-Defying Cable Cars In Georgia
programme.desc: If you love urban exploration, forgotten architecture, and the stories hidden in decay, then Georgia should be your next adventure destination. DW's Anja Koch takes you to two of the country's most haunting lost places: Tskaltubo, a once-grand Soviet spa town with abandoned sanatoriums, and Chiatura, a former mining city where eerie, rusting cable cars cling to the cliffs.

programme.title: The Omnivore - How Calico Crayfish Are Threatening Species Diversity
programme.desc: They eat and reproduce at record speed - calico crayfish. In its quest for more information about the species, this report finds tens of thousands of crayfish in just one pool along the upper Rhine River. Can this invasive creature still be stopped?

programme.title: Serving The Pope With Your Life - What It's Like To Be A Swiss Guard
programme.desc: Dario is 25, Swiss, and has just sworn to protect the Pope - even if it costs him his life. In this rare behind-the-scenes look, we follow him through Vatican City, past tourists and tradition, and into the inner workings of one of the world's oldest military units.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E33 - The Island Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E21 - Pepper
programme.desc: Pepper performs a bell ringing act.

programme.title: E32 - Tin Can Games
programme.desc: It's the Tin Can Games and Evil Pea wants to win the Tin Can Trophy. She cheats in the final race by putting a magnet on Supertato's back to stop him from going super fast.

programme.title: E14 - Top Fun
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E10 - Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E14 - Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: E16 - Gua Rusa, Borneo
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch discovers his Halloween pumpkin isn't as big as the Grimbots' one, he goes in search of some fertilizer to help it grow.

programme.title: E1 - Free The Roads
programme.desc: Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.desc: The circus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.desc: Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap is too much.

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E19 - Andy And The Baby Alligators
programme.desc: When Andy inadvertently destroys an audio tape of a recording that Mr Hammond made of a baby alligator, it's up to him to replace it.

programme.title: E17 - Christmas Island, Indian Ocean
programme.desc: The Go Jetters snap into action as Glitch seeks some festive cheer on Christmas Island.

programme.title: E16 - Gua Rusa, Borneo

programme.title: E2 - Umbrella Bubbles
programme.desc: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to face his fear of getting wet and take his first bath.

programme.title: E18 - Circus
programme.desc: The circus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: E28 - Stories

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Laa-Laa and Po pick delicious green beans. The Noo---noo puts the beans into the Tubby Custard Machine and out comes tasty, green Tubby Custard!

All Meow for Ice Cream
programme.desc: It's an extremely hot day and Cream, the ice cream maker cat, has bad news: his ice cream machine isn't working! The Buffycats help Cream prepare ice cream manually, but Baby Pie sneaks in the lab and eats it all! How will they save the day?

programme.title: Old Roads
programme.desc: The detention team follows their clue to a haunted church that supposedly reveals your darkest fears. The team splits up to cover more ground. Scared and alone, they realise someone or something is following them.

programme.title: Flippy's shoes
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy get into some serious rivalry over who's better at basketball and organise a showdown. Flippy's new trainers turn out to have powers that give him the edge; he looks certain to win, until it all goes wrong.

programme.title: The Pitmans: Martial Arts Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Lisa and Chris Pitman are a married couple who hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most concrete blocks broken in thirty seconds by a mixed team of two. The couple shares what it takes to become the best in the world in martial arts.

programme.title: Legends of Apollo
programme.desc: When Neil Armstrong became the first human to set foot on the moon, it put an emphatic end to the space race between the United States and the Soviet Union. We explore the accomplishments of Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin, the two astronauts who first landed on the moon.

programme.title: 3, 2, 1...Lift-off!
programme.desc: The chemical reaction that takes place in the engines of a real rocket produces a large amount of very hot gas that makes the rocket lift off into the sky. Eric mixes baking powder and water to create a chemical reaction strong enough to launch a toy rocket.

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Daisy and The Hippos
programme.desc: Daisy, the donkey, has a painful eye that needs sorting out. The Junior Vets give hungry hippos Ernie and Godzilla a dental check and find out if George the giraffe has any unwelcome guests.

programme.title: The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on an adventure to match a lost tooth to its owner.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers dive into the water at Table Mountain National Park and discover starfish and sea anemones. Then they head out to sea in a research boat and meet a school of Sevengill Cow Sharks.

programme.title: An Almost Villain
programme.desc: Riwahl realizes that he will never be a real superhero, so he decides to become a supervillain. When Cleopatra shows up to catch Sprinter, Riwahl tries to help her. It becomes clear that he is not a villain.

programme.title: Medium Size Boom
programme.desc: Boom invents a weapon that can make anything into a diamond. This way, he can both destroy everything and get rich. Fortunately, Sprinter is there to stop his crazy plan.

programme.title: Fall of the Guardians
programme.desc: It's exam time at Regal Academy, and Rose, Hawk, Travis, Astoria and Joy have special classes taught by the Guardian Dragons themselves! They're interrupted by the Wicked Stepsisters, who take control of the Dragons and turn them against our heroes!

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii island-hopping: Lava exploration on the Big Island by land and sea with local teens, muddy ATV ride in Kauai, and cultural insights at a lively luau. A week of thrilling adventures and Hawaiian traditions!

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Bear
programme.desc: Henry meets a Bear in the woods. He becomes a Park Ranger and reads Bear a bedtime story to help him get sleepy for hibernation.

programme.title: Grounding Max
programme.desc: When Max is entrusted with a valuable crystal trophy, Teresa plots to get him grounded for life by smashing it to pieces while it's in his possession.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: It's So Dice
programme.desc: In this episode Eric presents an amazing dice trick: Just by looking at a tower of any number of dice, he can accurately calculate the sum of the hidden faces. How does he do it? And, is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: Rip Roaring Roller Coaster
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build their own roller-coaster and learn how trains stay on track and how you can loop the loop.

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E101 - Thundercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe bring Chloe on an undercover mission to Secret Shores so she can experience life as a normal kid. When a new supervillain threat emerges, the trio must stay in town longer than they anticipated.

programme.title: E112 - Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: E115 - #OscarTheOuch
programme.desc: Sam and Cat's babysitting skills are tested when they look after a young boy, Oscar, who is very prone to accidents. The girls are determined to showing Oscar a fun time while struggling to keep him out of harm's way.

programme.title: E103 - Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and 'correct the record.

programme.title: E101 - Thundercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe bring Chloe on an undercover mission to Secret Shores so she can experience life as a normal kid. When a new supervillain threat emerges, the trio must stay in town longer than they anticipated.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E314 - Double Date Danger
programme.desc: When Miss Shapen’s niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.title: E112 - The Pearl
programme.desc: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: E216 - Cave Dwelling Sponge / The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town - and only SpongeBob can communicate with him! // When a flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob has to get them out before they ruin the whole town!

programme.title: E228 - Fun-Sized Friends / Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. It's a whole hunk of homunculus fun! // Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E410 - Storm and the Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Gargamel is going to look for a talisman that will help him to find the Smurfies' village. Storm decides that she's going to get there before him. But it's a trap set up by Gargamel, who grabs the talisman and tries to capture all the Smurfies.

programme.title: E210 - Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn’t trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: E103 - Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and 'correct the record.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E104 - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: E410 - Storm and the Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Gargamel is going to look for a talisman that will help him to find the Smurfies' village. Storm decides that she's going to get there before him. But it's a trap set up by Gargamel, who grabs the talisman and tries to capture all the Smurfies.

programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It’s Dad’s annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Veteran chief police detective In-ho (SONG Kang-ho) receives a tip about a man threatening a terrorist attack against a plane. While investigating, he discovers that the suspect has actually boarded flight no. KI501. Despite his phobia of flying, Jae-hyuk (LEE Byung-hun) decides to go to Hawaii for the sake for his daughter's health. At the airport, he is distracted by a strange man who hangs around, speaking to them in a menacing way. Flight no. KI501 departs Incheon Airport for Hawaii, but soon afterwards a man dies for mysterious reasons. Fear and chaos spread quickly, not only inside the plane, but also on land. Hearing this news, Transport Minister Sook-hee (JEON Do-yeon) sets up a counterterrorism task force and calls an emergency meeting in order to find a way to land the airplane.

programme.title: E203 - The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E301 - Ratoncito Perez / The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: E406 - Hospital
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is in hospital with a broken leg.

programme.title: E408 - Miss Rabbit's Helicopter
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit takes Peppa and her family for a ride in her rescue helicopter.

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E126 - The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: E802 - Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: E115 - Pups Save A Hoedown / Pups Save Alex
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station! // When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E1021 - Pups And Cats Save Humcatdingerman / Pups Save A Turbot Tournament
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger becomes HumCatDingerMan to steal the spotlight from the Cat Pack. // The pups must save Granny Tilly when an impromptu Turbot Tournament gets overly competitive.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire

programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E501 - Aj To The Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: E501 - Pups Save The Kitty Rescue Crew / Pups Save An Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. // The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home. The PAW Patrol must find and lead it to the Wingnuts' ranch.

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E415 - Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: E417 - Champion Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loses his title as Champion Puddle Jumper during the Daddi-Olympics, so everyone helps him train to win it back at the Daddi-Olympics.

programme.title: E203 - The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground!

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Bini Chapter 1: Born To Win[Live]
programme.desc: A feature documentary chronicling the rise of BINI, the Filipino P‑pop girl group, tracing their origins, intensive pre‑debut training, early challenges-including the ABS‑CBN shutdown and pandemic years-and their growing success leading up to their first solo concert, Biniverse. The film features behind‑the‑scenes footage, personal stories, and the group's milestone achievements in 2024, highlighting themes of resilience, sisterhood, and artistic growth.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - Allies and Adversaries
programme.desc: Feel the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth’s oddest creatures. Dive deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E1 - Stinkers
programme.desc: In nature, the right stench can mean the difference between life or death. Meet nature's odor-equipped inhabitants, from vomiting grasshoppers to dung-flinging hippos, and even a flower that's adapted to smell like death.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E8 - Tree Tales
programme.desc: Trees are Africa’s oldest residents, and each has its own strategy for surviving the dry season. The sausage tree and the fig tree ride-out seasonal extremes, to provide food and shelter for struggling animals in the lean times. In return animals help these trees to reproduce by pollinating their flowers and dispersing their seed. African trees promote life, and form the backbone of one of Earths’ most precious ecosystems.

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E7 - Scoreless
programme.desc: Using a unique method to crack a safe, Nick Wells (Robert De Niro) uses a blowtorch to cut through a safe, fill it with water, and blow the door off using a small explosive device. We test this, along with the effects of a 20mm antitank rifle on a safe from the movie Thuderbolt and Lightfoot.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell

Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E10 - Esteban Salazar
programme.desc: Chef Esteban Salazar, originally from Colombia, draws inspiration from his home country and numerous travels. On today's menu: red tuna crusted with cocoa nibs, served with white rice cooked in coconut milk.

programme.title: E12 - La Guisane, A Golden Valley
programme.desc: The Guisane valley is a jewel of the Hautes-Alpes. Bathed in light, it stretches between Briancon and the Lautaret Pass. Autumn is undoubtedly the most spectacular season, when the vast larch forests covering all the northern slopes blaze with golden color.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.desc: A documentary that follows a diverse and underdog tchoukball team from Davao as they struggle against internal conflicts and stronger rivals in their bid to represent the Philippines in an international competition.

programme.desc: A documentary that follows a Filipino filmmaker and his family on a religious pilgrimage to Haifa, where the journey brings both spiritual peace and inner conflict as he reflects on his life back home.

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: E7 - Dorset
programme.desc: Ben travels to Dorset to live for a week with Chris, a former paratrooper who has spent the last five years walking Britain's coastline, finding love and raising thousands for charity.

programme.title: E10 - Milan, Part 1
programme.desc: Michael enjoys the sites from the back of a classic 1960s Lambretta, scales the magnificent Duomo cathedral, is given a crash course on espresso etiquette and learns to dress like a Milanese.

programme.title: E11 - Milan, Part 2
programme.desc: Michael gets behind the wheel of a vintage racing car, makes a mystical discovery at the magnificent Castello Sforzesco, stirs up an aperitivo and throws his hand at one of Milan's favourite sports.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and actor Ryu Sooyoung embark on a coastal journey to discover South Korea's spring seafood traditions. From the hills of Namhae to the mudflats of Taean, the duo harvests fernbrake, digs for clams, and catches blue crabs.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E8 - 杜德偉驚喜加盟再唱《情人》
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E8 - 胡夏以歌傳情
programme.desc: 蘇有朋、薛之謙、王嘉爾、周筆暢、胡彥斌、歐陽娜娜等明星作為音浪召集人，他們將與300位合夥人組成3組音浪團，在24小時內緊急排練，一起完成創意十足的音樂SHOW。

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III
programme.desc: The year is 1974. A young Hong Kong Chinese, Mark, travels to Saigon to make his fortune. There, he encounters a mysterious femme fatale, the lovely Kit. As he becomes more involved in her various underworld deals, a tragic romance develops. On the eve of the outbreak of war, Kit's past returns to endanger her, and Mark must risk everything for the one true love of his life...

programme.title: Metade Fumaca
programme.desc: Killer Leopard, diagnosed as having Alzheimer's Disease, returns to Hong Kong with a half cigarette, to meet his beloved woman for the last time...
